features: Variety in One Package: Our pearl headband set includes five distinct styles, from classic single-row to intricate rhinestone designs, catering to diverse styling needs for both casual and formal occasions.

Durable and Lustrous: Crafted from high-quality ABS plastic and zinc alloy, these white pearl headbands for women feature artificial pearls and rhinestones, offering a real-like appearance and long-lasting durability.
Comfortable Fit: Designed with smooth edges and soft fabric ends, these non slip white pearl hair bands ensure a comfortable fit without pinching, making them ideal for all-day wear.

Versatile Styling: Perfect for all hair types, these pearl headbands for girls enhance any hairstyle, whether curly or straight, adding a touch of elegance to your look for weddings, parties, and daily outings.

Ideal Gift Choice: These white faux pearl bridal hair hoops make wonderful gifts for loved ones on special occasions like Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, and Christmas, offering a blend of style and functionality.
description: Specifications: Name: Pearl Headbands for Women Color: White, Gold Material: ABS Plastic + Zinc Alloy + Polyester Function: Decorative Dimensions: 5.51 × 4.72 inches / 14 × 12 cm Packaging Dimensions: 18 × 15 × 2 cm Packaging Method: Bag Gross Weight: 77 g Packing Contents: 5 Pearl Headbands for Women per package Discover the elegance and versatility of our pearl headbands for women, designed to enhance any hairstyle with a touch of sophistication. Crafted from high-quality ABS plastic, zinc alloy, and polyester, these white pearl headbands are perfect for both casual and formal occasions. Each set includes five unique styles, ensuring you have the perfect accessory for every event. Our pearl headbands for women are adorned with artificial pearls and rhinestones, creating a lustrous appearance that mimics real pearls. The sturdy alloy frame ensures durability, while the non-slip design keeps the headbands securely in place throughout the day. Whether you're attending a wedding, party, or simply enjoying a day out, these white pearl headbands for women will complement your look beautifully. Designed with comfort in mind, these pearl headbands for girls feature smooth edges and soft fabric ends, protecting your ears from discomfort during extended wear. The flexible design allows for easy adjustment, accommodating various head sizes without pinching or causing pain. Perfect for gifting, these bridal hair hoops are ideal for birthdays, anniversaries, Valentine's Day, and other special occasions. The elegant design of these white faux pearl bridal hair hoops makes them suitable for brides, bridesmaids, and flower girls, adding a touch of charm and unity to any wedding ceremony. Enhance your accessory collection with these versatile pearl headbands, suitable for daily wear, photography sessions, and festive celebrations. Embrace the timeless beauty of pearls and elevate your style with these exquisite hairbands.
